chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-78 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ta flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 13-02-2024 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Learned AAG files report of respondent No.5 and submits that already 02.02.2024 has been fixed for demarcation of the land, as prayed by the petitioner. This petition having served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
